stt_notes: Moonshine/Moon-whatever small streaming STT is a good candidate, but STT model is not locked yet.

routes.name: scroll_down
routes.description: Scroll the focused window down. Focus-aware: terminal/Pig/Pi may use mouse wheel; browser/editor may use PageDown.

routes.name: scroll_up
routes.description: Scroll the focused window up. Focus-aware: terminal/Pig/Pi may use mouse wheel; browser/editor may use PageUp.

routes.name: make_full_screen
routes.description: Toggle fullscreen for the currently focused i3 window using default i3 behavior.

routes.name: exit_full_screen
routes.description: Exit fullscreen for the currently focused i3 window using default i3 behavior.

routes.name: list_routed_commands
routes.description: List all directly routed voice commands and what they do.

routes.name: open_firefox
routes.description: Open a new Firefox window. Silent computer action; no TTS.

routes.name: close_firefox
routes.description: Close open Firefox windows via i3. No-op if Firefox is not open. Silent computer action; no TTS.

routes.name: close_youtube
routes.description: Close any open mpv windows (YouTube playback). No-op if mpv is not open. Silent computer action; no TTS.

routes.name: youtube_search
routes.description: Open a new Firefox/i3 window directly to YouTube search results for the query. Silent computer action; no TTS.

routes.name: research_tell_me
routes.description: Route to Pig/main LLM for web/research answer, then speak the result with TTS.

fallback.description: If it is not one of the directly routed commands, send it to the main LLM/Pig.
